overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a static first-person view from an apartment bedroom overlooking Night City. The camera remains stationary as morning sunlight streams through a panoramic window, illuminating the unmade bed while futuristic flying vehicles periodically pass by the towering megabuildings outside.

segments.scene_description: A static first-person view from inside a cyberpunk apartment bedroom, looking out through a panoramic window at the sprawling Night City skyline. The unmade bed sits in the foreground while exposed brick walls frame the left side. Morning sunlight streams through the window, illuminating the room and the futuristic cityscape dominated by a massive megabuilding tower on the right. Flying vehicles periodically pass by outside, with three distinct traffic events occurring during the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective from a cyberpunk bedroom that captures the gradual progression of morning light over a sprawling urban skyline. It begins with a view of an unmade bed in the foreground, framed by exposed brick walls as soft sunlight streams through a panoramic window. As the light intensifies, the focus shifts toward the massive megabuilding tower dominating the right side of the futuristic cityscape. The scene then evolves through a series of rhythmic movements as flying vehicles periodically glide past the window, cutting through the morning air. Finally, the composition settles into a steady gaze at the dense architecture of Night City, illuminated by the growing brightness of the day.
